examples: We're doing ham with a praline sauce.
These chocolates are filled with almond praline.
The changing trend of soluble sugar content was similar with that of praline.
The caramel praline cups, pineapple butter creams and curacao orange liqueur truffles are designed to lure even the most reluctant sweet-toothed visitor.
Innovatively flavoured chocolates sit alongside the classics, all with evocative names: try the Friendship (almond praline), Amour (nougat centre) and Audacity (quince jelly).
